description: Style Note An expert blend of practical and chic, hidekraft's black handbag is a clever investment for girls on the go. Crafted from the finest leather, it's soft to the touch yet built for durability. Sleek and smart with a roomy interior, this simply silhouetted piece will take you through this season and beyond in style. Product DetailsBlack handbag made from leather, one main zippered compartment with two pouches, has a zippered pocket inside and one zippered pocket at the back, two handles for carrying ease and five feet  at the bottom Warranty: 180 days Material and Care 100% genuine leatherWipe with cloth when required Size Height: 27 cm Width: 35 cmDepth: 12 cm
